name: e2e-v2-parallel-reduce
description: Run a v2 parallel stage followed by a reduce stage with source context injection.

tasks.prompt: Reply exactly E2E_V2_REDUCE_SOURCE_A and do not inspect or modify files.
Reply exactly E2E_V2_REDUCE_SOURCE_B and do not inspect or modify files.

stages.prompt: If the Source Stage Context lists fanout.a with status completed and includes E2E_V2_REDUCE_SOURCE_A in an output preview, and lists fanout.b with status completed and includes E2E_V2_REDUCE_SOURCE_B in an output preview, reply exactly E2E_V2_REDUCE_OK. Otherwise reply exactly E2E_V2_REDUCE_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
